evals.name: definition-lookup-tags-wins
evals.prompt: I'm working in /home/fenrir/code/casa (a multi-module Spring Boot monorepo open in IntelliJ). Where is the class OrderRuleService defined? Give me file:line and a one-line summary.
evals.expected_output: Should answer with file:line for OrderRuleService at we-business-order-starter/we-business-order-audit/.../OrderRuleService.java:22. The skill should make Claude try gtags FIRST (cheap, fast) and not jump straight to MCP for a plain definition lookup. Acceptable to fall through to MCP if tags miss; not acceptable to skip tags entirely.

evals.name: implementers-mcp-required
evals.prompt: I'm working in /home/fenrir/code/casa (open in IntelliJ). What classes extend WorkflowAuditStrategy? List each one with file:line.
evals.expected_output: Should find at least OrderWorkflowAuditStrategy and OrderReturnWorkflowAuditStrategy (both in we-business-order-audit). Implementer/subclass queries are semantic — gtags can't answer them properly. Skill should drive Claude to use mcp__idea__search_symbol + mcp__idea__get_symbol_info, NOT just rg for 'extends WorkflowAuditStrategy'.

evals.name: callers-prefer-mcp
evals.prompt: I'm in /home/fenrir/code/casa (open in IntelliJ). Who calls OrderCommonRuleService — show me every place its methods (execute, supports) are invoked. file:line for each.
evals.expected_output: OrderCommonRuleService is the parent class of OrderRuleService. Should resolve callers semantically (subclass invocations, @Component lookups, RuleService consumers). Skill should drive Claude to mcp__idea__get_symbol_info on the class — NOT just rg for 'OrderCommonRuleService' which would miss real call sites and include @Component name string matches.

evals.name: spring-bean-name-text-search
evals.prompt: I'm in /home/fenrir/code/casa (open in IntelliJ). Where is the Spring bean named 'OrderWorkflowAuditStrategy' (the @Bean method or @Component) registered, and where is it injected/looked-up by name? Show me file:line for each.
evals.expected_output: Should find @Bean orderWorkflowAuditStrategy() in OrderAuditAutoConfiguration.java:13 and any @Qualifier/@Resource/getBean calls referencing the name. Bean-name lookups are textual (string-keyed wiring) — gtags's -rx will miss them; rg works but MCP's index-backed search_in_files_by_text is faster on a 188-module repo. Skill should pick MCP search_in_files_by_text over rg.
